goal: Implement dual difficulty hand-limit rules (normal and novice), add enforced discard flow in battleV2, and integrate novice tutorial trigger without removing existing game framework.
constraints: Do not remove or replace existing battle/menu/story framework.
Implement as additive changes: keep current flow and add difficulty + discard behaviors.
Normal mode uses hand limit 8 and discard timeout 15s.
Novice mode uses hand limit 9 and discard timeout 18s.
Discard flow must be deterministic and non-blocking (timeout auto-discard).
deliverables: battleV2 state supports difficulty rules and discard phase state machine.
Pre-battle flow exposes difficulty selection and passes it into battle runtime.
Battle UI supports player discard selection/confirmation with countdown.
Novice mode triggers tutorial onboarding at battle start.
